title: Citrusy Dense Indulgent Japanese Broccoli Stir-fry
description: A rich and dense dish featuring purple sprouting broccoli in a citrus-infused sauce, perfect for an indulgent side dish or light meal.

ingredients.name: soy sauce
ingredients.notes: regular soy sauce or low-sodium soy sauce

instructions: Heat sesame oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add ginger and scallions; sauté for about 2 minutes until fragrant and slightly softened.
Toss in chopped purple sprouting broccoli and stir-fry for another 3-4 minutes, stirring occasionally to prevent sticking.
Pour in lemon juice and soy sauce. Stir well to combine all ingredients evenly.
Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes or until the broccoli is tender but still has a slight crunch.
Garnish with lime zest just before serving.
